    ACME Dental

    Abbotsford & Aldergrove Dentist

    FAMILY FRIENDLY DENTAL AND IMPLANT CENTRE

    LOCATED IN ABBOTSFORD, BC

    ​

    Contact Us Today

    Safety First

    We prioritize safety with contactless check-in, health checks, enhanced PPE, and advanced air filtration system.

    Full Service Dentistry

    Our centre provides an array of services including general dentistry, cosmetic dentistry, orthodontics, emergency care and dental implants.

    Insurance Accepted

    We are happy to bill your insurance company on your behalf.

    Dentistry for the Entire Family

    At ACME Dental and Implant Centre, our aim is to provide customized and affordable treatment options to patients of all ages and backgrounds.

    ​

    Whether you are seeking advanced dental implants, BOTOX injections, or a new family dentist, Dr. Amol Shergill and Dr. Bonnie Randhawa bring extensive training and years of experience to your service.

    Our Team

    A Modern Dental Clinic 

    For the New Normal.

     

    Whether you are a senior citizen or a parent looking for a welcoming environment for your children, you will feel at home in our newly built dental office.

     

    We offer neck pillows, television, and internet for our patients. Our treatment rooms play cartoons for anxious or bored children.

     

    ACME Dental and Implant Centre is conveniently located in a new strip plaza. The office is a short drive from nearby Abbotsford, Aldergrove, Langley, Surrey, Maple Ridge, and Chilliwack.

    Contact Us Today

    Advanced

    Dental Technology

    As part of our mission to provide advanced and effective care, our office is equipped with state-of-the-art dental equipment that includes:

    Our advanced dental equipment allows our doctors to perform a wide range of dental services that include:

    • Digital X-rays

    • Electronic Charts

    • Digital Impressions

    • Ultrasonic Scaler

    • Dental implants

    • Implant-supported dentures

    • Orthodontics

      • Braces (metal and clear)

      • Clear aligners
